page.title: Hen Party Yacht Marbella: Boats, Packages & 2026 Prices

data.meta_description: Plan your hen party yacht Marbella charter in 2026. Compare boats from €749/2h, all with skipper, drinks & snacks. Book now.
data.summary: Hen party yacht Marbella charters start at €749 for 2 hours with skipper, drinks and snacks included. Our fleet ranges from 5 to 12 passengers, all departing from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and IVA (21%)
Drinks: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava + light snacks included
Largest boat: Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – ideal for big groups
All departures from Puerto Banús – central Marbella location
Jet ski included free on Mangusta 80 charters (min 4h)
No hidden costs – pricing is all-inclusive
2026 season: book early for best availability

faq.q: How much does a hen party yacht cost in Marbella?
faq.a: Our hen party charters start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, all inclusive. For a larger group, the Mangusta 80 (12 pax) costs €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, with a jet ski included. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in a hen party yacht charter?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges at the dock.

faq.q: Which boat is best for a hen party of 10-12 people?
faq.a: For 10-12 guests we recommend the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax), or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax). All depart from Puerto Banús and include drinks and snacks.

faq.q: Can we bring our own decorations or music?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations (balloons, banners) and play your own music via Bluetooth or AUX on board. Just avoid anything that might damage the boat or disturb other charters.

faq.q: Do we need a skipper? Can we drive ourselves?
faq.a: A licensed skipper is included on every charter. You cannot drive the boat yourself unless you hold a valid Spanish boating licence. The skipper handles navigation so you can relax.

faq.q: What time do charters start and how long can we book?
faq.a: Charters typically start from 10:00, 12:00, 14:00, or 16:00. You can book from 2 hours up to a full day (8 hours). Evening sunset cruises are also popular for hen parties.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on our day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we reschedule or offer a full refund. For minor weather, the skipper may adjust the route to sheltered areas like Cabopino or Estepona.

faq.q: How do I book a hen party yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp or our website enquiry form. We'll confirm availability, send you a quote, and take a deposit to secure your date. Balance is due on the day.

data.body_html:
Planning a hen do in Marbella? A hen party yacht Marbella charter is the ultimate way to celebrate – sun, sea, and champagne on the Costa del Sol. Our fleet departs from Puerto Banús, with prices starting at €749 for 2 hours all-inclusive. No hidden costs, no surprises. Just you, your girls, and the Mediterranean.

Why choose a hen party yacht in Marbella?

Marbella offers 320 days of sunshine a year, calm waters, and a glamorous backdrop. A private yacht lets you skip crowded beach clubs and enjoy your own floating party. You can anchor off Cala del Faro for a swim, cruise past the Golden Mile, or stop for photos at the Puerto Banús marina. Every charter includes a skipper, so you don't need a licence – just bring your playlist and your party spirit.

Hen party yacht prices 2026

All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA. No extra fees.

BoatCapacityStarting price
Astondoa 409 pax€749 / 2h
Azimut 3911 pax€749 / 2h
Mangusta 80 (Grey/White)12 pax€4,719 / 4h (jet ski included)
Other boats (Fairline, Pershing, Ferretti etc.)Up to 12 paxPricing on request via WhatsApp

For a full list of boats and options, see our boat rental Marbella hub.

Best boats for hen parties

For groups up to 9, the Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 are compact and affordable. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) offer plenty of deck space. The Ferretti 94 (29m) is our largest – perfect for a VIP hen weekend. All depart from Puerto Banús.

What's included on your hen party charter

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

You can bring your own food, decorations, and drinks (no glass on some boats). Just let us know in advance.

Popular itineraries for hen parties

Most charters head west towards Estepona or east to Cabopino. Popular stops include Cala del Faro for swimming, Cala Cortés for a secluded cove, and the Río Verde area for dolphin spotting. Your skipper will tailor the route to your group's wishes.

How to book your hen party yacht

Contact us via WhatsApp or the enquiry form on our website. We'll check availability, send a quote, and take a deposit to secure your date. Balance is payable on the day. For 2026, we recommend booking at least 2-3 weeks in advance, especially for weekends.

Frequently asked questions

How much does a hen party yacht cost in Marbella?

Our hen party charters start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, all inclusive. For a larger group, the Mangusta 80 (12 pax) costs €4,719 for a minimum of 4 hours, with a jet ski included. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

What is included in a hen party yacht charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges at the dock.

Which boat is best for a hen party of 10-12 people?

For 10-12 guests we recommend the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax), or Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax). All depart from Puerto Banús and include drinks and snacks.

Can we bring our own decorations or music?

Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations (balloons, banners) and play your own music via Bluetooth or AUX on board. Just avoid anything that might damage the boat or disturb other charters.

Do we need a skipper? Can we drive ourselves?

A licensed skipper is included on every charter. You cannot drive the boat yourself unless you hold a valid Spanish boating licence. The skipper handles navigation so you can relax.

What time do charters start and how long can we book?

Charters typically start from 10:00, 12:00, 14:00, or 16:00. You can book from 2 hours up to a full day (8 hours). Evening sunset cruises are also popular for hen parties.

What happens if the weather is bad on our day?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we reschedule or offer a full refund. For minor weather, the skipper may adjust the route to sheltered areas like Cabopino or Estepona.

How do I book a hen party yacht in Marbella?

Contact us via WhatsApp or our website enquiry form. We'll confirm availability, send you a quote, and take a deposit to secure your date. Balance is due on the day.
